description: Clive joined the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority (NDA) in April 2005, after 15 years with British Nuclear Fuels, where he undertook a number of roles across research and development, technical and commercial areas. Through this he covered the full range of activities and facilities at Sellafield, including reprocessing, waste management and decommissioning, He also spent time in the US and overseas. Roles undertaken within NDA, culminating in acting as Group Chief Nuclear Strategy Officer, have allowed Clive to gain a comprehensive understanding of the NDA’s estate, the strategy and policy landscape, and provide leadership on strategy development and implementation for the group, and with DESNZ and regulators, through strong collaborative relationships. Clive’s current role, in addition to leadership of the group’s strategy function, includes sponsorship of AGR activities, civil – military collaboration, group international relations and the NDA Trusted To Do More portfolio. He is also exec sponsor of the Race Equality Network. Clive is currently the NDA nominated NED for Nuclear Transport Solutions and INS – Japan and latterly he has joined the Nuclear Waste Services Board. Clive has a BSC and MSC in Engineering and Applied Mathematics, is a graduate of the Cabinet Office Project Leadership Programme and was a member of the first NDA Leadership Academy cohort.

Clive’s current role, in addition to leadership of the group’s strategy function, includes sponsorship of AGR activities, civil – military collaboration, group international relations and the NDA Trusted To Do More portfolio. He is also exec sponsor of the Race Equality Network.

Clive is currently the NDA nominated NED for Nuclear Transport Solutions and INS – Japan and latterly he has joined the Nuclear Waste Services Board.
